description: Introducing our robust 16-liter Bucket with a secure, snap-on lid, perfect for various storage and transportation needs. Crafted with durable plastic and metal materials, this round bucket ensures longevity and stability. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, it's easy to clean and maintain. With a 16-liter capacity, it's spacious enough for your gardening tools, laundry, or even as a waste bin. The bucket's round shape offers a compact footprint, making it easy to store and maneuver in tight spaces.
